name: ruff_check_failure
description: Diagnose and fix a ruff lint failure (unused import)

expected_behaviors.assertion: output contains reference to ruff check errors or warnings
the unused import is removed from src/screencropnet_yolov11/inference.py
ruff check is run locally and passes before any git push
commit message starts with fix: or style:
git add uses specific file names, not -A or .

name: ruff_format_drift
description: Diagnose and fix a ruff format CI failure (whitespace drift)

expected_behaviors.description: Identifies the ruff format failure category
expected_behaviors.assertion: output references ruff format or formatting drift
uv run ruff format is executed to fix formatting
ruff format --check (or make lint) is run and passes before pushing

expected_behaviors.description: Polls for new CI run by commit SHA
expected_behaviors.assertion: after pushing, the new run is identified by matching headSha, not by picking the latest run

name: pytest_failure
description: Diagnose and fix a failing pytest assertion

expected_behaviors.assertion: output references pytest or test failure

expected_behaviors.description: Investigates the failing test or implementation
expected_behaviors.assertion: the failing test file (or module under test) is read before applying a fix
make test or uv run pytest is executed and passes before any git push

name: no_failures_clean_exit
description: When all CI runs are passing, report clean status and exit early

expected_behaviors.assertion: gh run list is called to check recent runs
output indicates all CI runs are passing or green
no git commits or pushes are made
command completes without entering fix phases
